## Checklist
- [ ] Tests and builds pass locally
  - [ ] `pnpm lint`
  - [ ] `pnpm build`
  - [ ] `pnpm check`
  - [ ] `pnpm test` 
- [ ] Docs `examples/squidoc-docs` are updated with any relevant information
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects published packages
